item.title: GODSPEED CONTROLLER AIM [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GODSPEED CONTROLLER AIM [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GODSPEED CONTROLLER AIM
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Godspeed Controller AIM is a revolutionary Magisk module developed by revWhiteShadow, designed to enhance the gaming experience on joystick-supported Android games. This innovative module tackles the common issue of recoil in shooting games by significantly reducing it when using a joystick for aiming. By seamlessly integrating with the Magisk framework, this module offers an easy-to-install solution for gamers seeking improved precision and control.
With Godspeed Controller AIM, players can enjoy a more immersive and accurate gaming experience. The module intelligently analyzes joystick movements and applies advanced algorithms to mitigate recoil, allowing gamers to maintain better control over their aiming. This reduction in recoil ensures smoother and more precise shots, leading to improved accuracy and potentially higher success rates in combat scenarios.

Whether it's an intense battle royale or a tactical first-person shooter, the Godspeed Controller AIM Magisk module provides a competitive edge by eliminating the frustration caused by excessive recoil. By optimizing joystick functionality and minimizing the impact of recoil, revWhiteShadow's module empowers gamers to focus on their strategies and gameplay, ultimately elevating their overall performance.

With its user-friendly installation process and compatibility with various joystick-supported Android games, Godspeed Controller AIM offers a convenient solution for gamers looking to enhance their gaming experience. By harnessing the power of this module, players can take their skills to the next level and dominate the virtual battlefield with superior aim control.
[read more]
item.description:
GODSPEED CONTROLLER AIM
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Godspeed Controller AIM is a revolutionary Magisk module developed by revWhiteShadow, designed to enhance the gaming experience on joystick-supported Android games. This innovative module tackles the common issue of recoil in shooting games by significantly reducing it when using a joystick for aiming. By seamlessly integrating with the Magisk framework, this module offers an easy-to-install solution for gamers seeking improved precision and control.
With Godspeed Controller AIM, players can enjoy a more immersive and accurate gaming experience. The module intelligently analyzes joystick movements and applies advanced algorithms to mitigate recoil, allowing gamers to maintain better control over their aiming. This reduction in recoil ensures smoother and more precise shots, leading to improved accuracy and potentially higher success rates in combat scenarios.

Whether it's an intense battle royale or a tactical first-person shooter, the Godspeed Controller AIM Magisk module provides a competitive edge by eliminating the frustration caused by excessive recoil. By optimizing joystick functionality and minimizing the impact of recoil, revWhiteShadow's module empowers gamers to focus on their strategies and gameplay, ultimately elevating their overall performance.

With its user-friendly installation process and compatibility with various joystick-supported Android games, Godspeed Controller AIM offers a convenient solution for gamers looking to enhance their gaming experience. By harnessing the power of this module, players can take their skills to the next level and dominate the virtual battlefield with superior aim control.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
GODSPEED CONTROLLER AIM
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Godspeed Controller AIM is a revolutionary Magisk module developed by revWhiteShadow, designed to enhance the gaming experience on joystick-supported Android games. This innovative module tackles the common issue of recoil in shooting games by significantly reducing it when using a joystick for aiming. By seamlessly integrating with the Magisk framework, this module offers an easy-to-install solution for gamers seeking improved precision and control.
With Godspeed Controller AIM, players can enjoy a more immersive and accurate gaming experience. The module intelligently analyzes joystick movements and applies advanced algorithms to mitigate recoil, allowing gamers to maintain better control over their aiming. This reduction in recoil ensures smoother and more precise shots, leading to improved accuracy and potentially higher success rates in combat scenarios.

Whether it's an intense battle royale or a tactical first-person shooter, the Godspeed Controller AIM Magisk module provides a competitive edge by eliminating the frustration caused by excessive recoil. By optimizing joystick functionality and minimizing the impact of recoil, revWhiteShadow's module empowers gamers to focus on their strategies and gameplay, ultimately elevating their overall performance.

With its user-friendly installation process and compatibility with various joystick-supported Android games, Godspeed Controller AIM offers a convenient solution for gamers looking to enhance their gaming experience. By harnessing the power of this module, players can take their skills to the next level and dominate the virtual battlefield with superior aim control.
[read more]

item.title: NeoCat - NeoFetch Theme Pack. [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:title: NeoCat - NeoFetch Theme Pack. [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:author: m3tozz
item.itunes:summary:
NeoCat - NeoFetch Theme Pack.
(Terminal Apps)
NeoCat: NeoFetch Theme Pack.
-
Theme List: https://m3tozz.github.io/NeoCat-Themes/
Community Discord Server: https://discord.gg/sQwYCZer95
-
Installation="bash ./neocat.sh --install"
Run(Without install)="bash ./neocat.sh --shell"
Install Terminal Icons (icons-in-terminal)="bash ./install-icons.sh"
Back Up Your Own NeoFetch Configuration="bash ./neocat.sh --backup"
-
https://www.buymeacoffee.com/m3tozz/
https://www.instagram.com/metinzuhree/
[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]

item.title: GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" developed by revWhiteShadow is a charging controller software that offers advanced features for fast charging capabilities on compatible devices. It provides users with greater control over their device's charging speed and options to optimize the charging process.
The main features of "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" include:

1. Custom Fast Charging mA: This feature allows users to set a custom charging current for their device, enabling them to increase or decrease the charging speed according to their preferences.

2. Fast Charge: The software supports fast charging protocols, enabling devices to charge at a higher rate than standard charging methods, reducing overall charging time.

3. Quick Charge: It integrates Quick Charge technology, which is designed to deliver faster charging speeds on devices that support this standard.

4. Super Fast Charge: The software includes optimizations for super-fast charging, allowing devices to charge at even higher speeds, provided the hardware supports it.

5. Set Smart Charging Limit: Users have the ability to set a smart charging limit, which ensures that their device doesn't overcharge and helps prolong battery lifespan. This feature helps prevent excessive battery wear and reduces the risk of overheating during charging.

6. Disable Smart Charging Limit: In addition to setting a smart charging limit, users also have the option to disable this feature, allowing their device to charge at its maximum capacity without any restrictions.

Overall, "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" offers users greater control over their device's charging process, allowing them to customize the charging speed, utilize fast charging protocols, set smart charging limits, and disable those limits when desired. It is designed to provide a more efficient and convenient charging experience for compatible devices.
[read more]
item.description:
GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" developed by revWhiteShadow is a charging controller software that offers advanced features for fast charging capabilities on compatible devices. It provides users with greater control over their device's charging speed and options to optimize the charging process.
The main features of "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" include:

1. Custom Fast Charging mA: This feature allows users to set a custom charging current for their device, enabling them to increase or decrease the charging speed according to their preferences.

2. Fast Charge: The software supports fast charging protocols, enabling devices to charge at a higher rate than standard charging methods, reducing overall charging time.

3. Quick Charge: It integrates Quick Charge technology, which is designed to deliver faster charging speeds on devices that support this standard.

4. Super Fast Charge: The software includes optimizations for super-fast charging, allowing devices to charge at even higher speeds, provided the hardware supports it.

5. Set Smart Charging Limit: Users have the ability to set a smart charging limit, which ensures that their device doesn't overcharge and helps prolong battery lifespan. This feature helps prevent excessive battery wear and reduces the risk of overheating during charging.

6. Disable Smart Charging Limit: In addition to setting a smart charging limit, users also have the option to disable this feature, allowing their device to charge at its maximum capacity without any restrictions.

Overall, "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" offers users greater control over their device's charging process, allowing them to customize the charging speed, utilize fast charging protocols, set smart charging limits, and disable those limits when desired. It is designed to provide a more efficient and convenient charging experience for compatible devices.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
GS FAST CHARGING CONTROLLER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" developed by revWhiteShadow is a charging controller software that offers advanced features for fast charging capabilities on compatible devices. It provides users with greater control over their device's charging speed and options to optimize the charging process.
The main features of "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" include:

1. Custom Fast Charging mA: This feature allows users to set a custom charging current for their device, enabling them to increase or decrease the charging speed according to their preferences.

2. Fast Charge: The software supports fast charging protocols, enabling devices to charge at a higher rate than standard charging methods, reducing overall charging time.

3. Quick Charge: It integrates Quick Charge technology, which is designed to deliver faster charging speeds on devices that support this standard.

4. Super Fast Charge: The software includes optimizations for super-fast charging, allowing devices to charge at even higher speeds, provided the hardware supports it.

5. Set Smart Charging Limit: Users have the ability to set a smart charging limit, which ensures that their device doesn't overcharge and helps prolong battery lifespan. This feature helps prevent excessive battery wear and reduces the risk of overheating during charging.

6. Disable Smart Charging Limit: In addition to setting a smart charging limit, users also have the option to disable this feature, allowing their device to charge at its maximum capacity without any restrictions.

Overall, "GODSPEED FAST CHARGING Controller" offers users greater control over their device's charging process, allowing them to customize the charging speed, utilize fast charging protocols, set smart charging limits, and disable those limits when desired. It is designed to provide a more efficient and convenient charging experience for compatible devices.

item.title: Orchid Platinum [3D Graphics]
item.itunes:title: Orchid Platinum [3D Graphics]
item.itunes:author: orchidplatinums
item.itunes:summary:
Orchid Platinum
(3D Graphics)
Orchid Platinum ultra-luxury project, coming up in the prime location of Whitefield, East Bangalore . This project consists of a world-class range of international amenities like a fully equipped clubhouse loaded with all indoor games. All ensuring that every need of the neighborhood is met. Step in with your family and experience a digital way of living where your urban lifestyle is simple, smart and hassle-free. Orchid Platinum Price will be quite competitive & affordable keeping market trends in mind.

[read more]

This project consists of a world-class range of international amenities like a fully equipped clubhouse loaded with all indoor games. All ensuring that every need of the neighborhood is met. Step in with your family and experience a digital way of living where your urban lifestyle is simple, smart and hassle-free. Orchid Platinum Price will be quite competitive & affordable keeping market trends in mind.

[read more]

Orchid Platinum
(3D Graphics)
Orchid Platinum ultra-luxury project, coming up in the prime location of Whitefield, East Bangalore . This project consists of a world-class range of international amenities like a fully equipped clubhouse loaded with all indoor games. All ensuring that every need of the neighborhood is met. Step in with your family and experience a digital way of living where your urban lifestyle is simple, smart and hassle-free. Orchid Platinum Price will be quite competitive & affordable keeping market trends in mind.

[read more]

item.title: Neutrino kernels For Vayu [300 - latest] [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:title: Neutrino kernels For Vayu [300 - latest] [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:author: zycromerz
item.itunes:summary:
Neutrino kernels For Vayu [300 - latest]
(Terminal Apps)
Custom Kernel For Poco X3 Pro / Vayu
Flamescion = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + dropped
Hareudang = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + Oc and Uv Gpu (min 140Mhz max 692Mhz) + dropped
Phantasm = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + UV GPU (min 140Mhz max same as default) + dropped
Flata = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + using latest CAF TAGS and upstream from android.googlesource.com
RutuF = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + based CAF TAGS LA.UM.9.1.r1-11300-SMxxx0.0 and upstream from android.googlesource.com
X = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + based CAF TAGS LA.UM.9.1.r1-11300-SMxxx0.0 and upstream from kernel.org

Gcc : for more battery backup and less overheat
Dtc : for more performance and more overheat
Proton / Clang-14 : for more balance
SDClang : compiled using toolchain from Qualcomm
ThinLTO = faster link time optimization
FullLTO = full link time optimization

List Zip Name :
- MPDCL = Msm Performance Disable Cpu Lock
- MPECL = Msm Performance Enable Cpu Lock
- STOCK = default gpu voltage and clock
- STOCK-UC = default gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz
- STOCK-UC-OC = default gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz and overclock maximum gpu to 692Mhz
- UV = Undervolt gpu voltage and stock gpu clock
- UV-UC = Undervolt gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz
- UV-UC-OC = Undervolt gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz and overclock maximum gpu to 692Mhz
- MUV = More undervolt gpu voltage (same as Hareudang) and stock gpu clock
- MUV-UC = Undervolt gpu voltage (same as Hareudang) and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz
- MUV-UC-OC = Undervolt gpu voltage (same as Hareudang) and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz and overclock maximum gpu to 692Mhz
- FST16 = lock sconfig value to 16 (only 1 cores will be disabled)
- FST10 = lock sconfig value to 10 (all cores will be keep turned on)

The difference is just a little but u can feels it later

Channel Telegram : https://t.me/NeutrinoCh

old links : https://www.pling.com/p/1806346/
[read more]
item.description:
Neutrino kernels For Vayu [300 - latest]
(Terminal Apps)
Custom Kernel For Poco X3 Pro / Vayu
Flamescion = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + dropped
Hareudang = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + Oc and Uv Gpu (min 140Mhz max 692Mhz) + dropped
Phantasm = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + UV GPU (min 140Mhz max same as default) + dropped
Flata = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + using latest CAF TAGS and upstream from android.googlesource.com
RutuF = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + based CAF TAGS LA.UM.9.1.r1-11300-SMxxx0.0 and upstream from android.googlesource.com
X = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + based CAF TAGS LA.UM.9.1.r1-11300-SMxxx0.0 and upstream from kernel.org

Gcc : for more battery backup and less overheat
Dtc : for more performance and more overheat
Proton / Clang-14 : for more balance
SDClang : compiled using toolchain from Qualcomm
ThinLTO = faster link time optimization
FullLTO = full link time optimization

List Zip Name :
- MPDCL = Msm Performance Disable Cpu Lock
- MPECL = Msm Performance Enable Cpu Lock
- STOCK = default gpu voltage and clock
- STOCK-UC = default gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz
- STOCK-UC-OC = default gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz and overclock maximum gpu to 692Mhz
- UV = Undervolt gpu voltage and stock gpu clock
- UV-UC = Undervolt gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz
- UV-UC-OC = Undervolt gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz and overclock maximum gpu to 692Mhz
- MUV = More undervolt gpu voltage (same as Hareudang) and stock gpu clock
- MUV-UC = Undervolt gpu voltage (same as Hareudang) and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz
- MUV-UC-OC = Undervolt gpu voltage (same as Hareudang) and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz and overclock maximum gpu to 692Mhz
- FST16 = lock sconfig value to 16 (only 1 cores will be disabled)
- FST10 = lock sconfig value to 10 (all cores will be keep turned on)

The difference is just a little but u can feels it later

Channel Telegram : https://t.me/NeutrinoCh

old links : https://www.pling.com/p/1806346/
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Neutrino kernels For Vayu [300 - latest]
(Terminal Apps)
Custom Kernel For Poco X3 Pro / Vayu
Flamescion = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + dropped
Hareudang = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + Oc and Uv Gpu (min 140Mhz max 692Mhz) + dropped
Phantasm = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + UV GPU (min 140Mhz max same as default) + dropped
Flata = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + using latest CAF TAGS and upstream from android.googlesource.com
RutuF = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + based CAF TAGS LA.UM.9.1.r1-11300-SMxxx0.0 and upstream from android.googlesource.com
X = supported memeui a11 and oss custom rom + based CAF TAGS LA.UM.9.1.r1-11300-SMxxx0.0 and upstream from kernel.org

Gcc : for more battery backup and less overheat
Dtc : for more performance and more overheat
Proton / Clang-14 : for more balance
SDClang : compiled using toolchain from Qualcomm
ThinLTO = faster link time optimization
FullLTO = full link time optimization

List Zip Name :
- MPDCL = Msm Performance Disable Cpu Lock
- MPECL = Msm Performance Enable Cpu Lock
- STOCK = default gpu voltage and clock
- STOCK-UC = default gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz
- STOCK-UC-OC = default gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz and overclock maximum gpu to 692Mhz
- UV = Undervolt gpu voltage and stock gpu clock
- UV-UC = Undervolt gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz
- UV-UC-OC = Undervolt gpu voltage and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz and overclock maximum gpu to 692Mhz
- MUV = More undervolt gpu voltage (same as Hareudang) and stock gpu clock
- MUV-UC = Undervolt gpu voltage (same as Hareudang) and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz
- MUV-UC-OC = Undervolt gpu voltage (same as Hareudang) and underclock minimum gpu to 150Mhz and overclock maximum gpu to 692Mhz
- FST16 = lock sconfig value to 16 (only 1 cores will be disabled)
- FST10 = lock sconfig value to 10 (all cores will be keep turned on)

The difference is just a little but u can feels it later

Channel Telegram : https://t.me/NeutrinoCh

old links : https://www.pling.com/p/1806346/
[read more]
